mentions.surface: bene fecit A. Silius qui transegerit
de Ovia confice, ut scribis
de Cicerone tempus esse iam videtur
Athenis permutarine possit
Publilius iturusne sit in Africam
iturusne sit in Africam et quando
et quando ex Aledio scire poteris
Aulus Silius has done well in settling the business
As to Ovia, finish it off, as you say
About young Cicero, the time now seems to be at hand
can be transferred by exchange at Athens
Whether Publilius is going to Africa
Publilius is going to Africa, and when
you will be able to find out from Aledius
itemque Preciana
de Attica optime
et ei salutem dices et Piliae
and the Precius one as well
About Attica, excellent
Give my greetings to her and to Pilia
